content.problemStatement:
Chef has an array a1,‚Ä¶,ana_1,\ldots, a_na1‚Äã,‚Ä¶,an‚Äã of nnn elements. He wants you to answer queries of the following type:

Compute f(L,R)f(L, R)f(L,R), where f(L,R)=‚àëi=LR‚àëj=iRgcd‚Å°(ai,ai+1,‚Ä¶aj).f(L, R) = \sum_{i = L}^{R} \sum_{j= i}^{R} \gcd(a_i, a_{i+1}, \dots a_j).f(L,R)=‚àëi=LR‚Äã‚àëj=iR‚Äãgcd(ai‚Äã,ai+1‚Äã,‚Ä¶aj‚Äã). In other words, we want to compute the sum of the greatest common divisors over all subarrays of some range [L,R][L, R][L,R].
Help Chef answer qqq queries of the described type.

###Input:

The first line contains two integers nnn and qqq - the size of the array and the number of queries.

The second line contains nnn integers a1,‚Ä¶,ana_1,\ldots,a_na1‚Äã,‚Ä¶,an‚Äã.

Each of the following qqq lines contains two integers lll, rrr.

The queries are encrypted. Let the answer to the previous query be xxx (or 000 if there is none). The query is decrypted as follows: L=((l+x)mod‚Äâ‚Äân)+1L=((l+x)\mod n)+1L=((l+x)modn)+1 and R=((r+x)mod‚Äâ‚Äân)+1R=((r+x) \mod n)+1R=((r+x)modn)+1.

###Output:

Print qqq integers - the answer to each query modulo 109+710^9+7109+7.

###Constraints

1‚â§n‚â§2‚ãÖ1051 \leq n \le 2\cdot 10^51‚â§n‚â§2‚ãÖ105

1‚â§q‚â§1061 \leq q \le 10^61‚â§q‚â§106

1‚â§ai‚â§1091 \leq a_{i} \le 10^91‚â§ai‚Äã‚â§109

0‚â§l,r‚â§n0 \leq l, r \le n0‚â§l,r‚â§n
